body: Due to the MPI trampoline [issues](https://github.com/CliMA/ClimaModules/issues/48), I split MPI out from climacommon. This PR adds MPI back in and marks relevant jobs as soft-fail
title: Temp fix for CI library issues

body:
- SOC diagnostic outputs volumetric concentration (kg C m^-3) with 15 soil layers
- ILAMB expects column-integrated carbon stock (kg C m^-2)
- Added integrated soil organic carbon diagnostic (over 1 m depth)

title: Fix SOC conversion for ILAMB: integrate over soil depth
